scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:worker
scripts.build:worker: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --packages=external --outfile=dist/index.js
scripts.worker:deploy: set -a; [ ! -f .env.local ] || . ./.env.local; set +a; npm run worker:config && ntn workers deploy --workers-config-file ${NOTION_WORKERS_CONFIG_FILE:-.local/workers.json}
